properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Only You can make it right again Only You will make me whole within No more fear and no more pain There's freedom in Your name Hallelujah

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Only You can hold this heart of mine Jesus, only You will satisfy In the storm, You are my peace Forever I will sing Hallelujah.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are higher than the heavens There is healing in Your presence You're the One that I run to Jesus only You Jesus only You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When the mountains shake, You are my strength By Your mercy You have covered me I'm forgiven, I am free You are my everything Hallelujah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I lift my hands as high as I can raise them And I will sing as loud as I can sing So let my praises be my declaration I worship You and You alone are King

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There on the cross, no other love was greater And I believe it's where You made me new You are my Rock, my Hope and my Salvation Hallelujah, Jesus only You Hallelujah, Jesus only You Oooh, Hallelujah

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Only You can make it right again (Jesus) Only You can make it right again
